name: SKELETON_FUNCTION__RANK_BY_FAMILY_COUNT__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
macro_frame_family_zh: 按家族量排序的靶点对排名
description: Independent frame skeleton for ranking target pairs by family count under a functional constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)<-[:HAS_PATENT]-(fam:Family)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT fam) AS family_count
ORDER BY family_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10
examples: Among target pairs related to the NK_Cell_Engagement_Target category, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the B_Cell_Lineage_Target category, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the Disease_Tissue / Cell Surface Anchors category, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
